title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline Data Manager and Analyst Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Data Manager and Analyst Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for the M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs...
